summary: Iteration 29 - Systeme.io Notifications & Phantom Alert Fix Testing Complete. All 3 features verified: 1) Systeme.io notifications integrated and logging correctly (tag=SKIP/FAIL expected since tag IDs are 0), 2) Phantom 'Test AlertQuestionario' removed - only 4 alerts present, 3) Admin Documenti tab shows onboarding docs correctly.

issues: Console hydration warnings about <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Systeme.io notification service correctly logs [NOTIFY] entries for doc_rifiutato, docs_in_verifica, docs_verificati, contratto_firmato
Tag IDs are set to 0 (placeholder) - notifications log 'tag=SKIP/FAIL' which is expected behavior until real tag IDs are configured
GET /api/alerts returns 4 alerts - no phantom 'Test AlertQuestionario' present
Admin PartnerDetailModal Documenti tab correctly shows 6 document types with status badges
PATCH /api/admin/partners/{id}/documents/{doc_type}/verify triggers notify_documents_verified() when all docs verified
Contract signing in contract.py line 755-760 triggers notify_contract_signed()

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 passed, 1 skipped - no uploaded doc to reject)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Systeme.io notifications integrated via tagging. Tag IDs in backend/.env are set to 0 (placeholder) - admin needs to create tags in Systeme.io dashboard and update IDs. Notification events: doc_rifiutato, docs_in_verifica, docs_verificati, contratto_firmato. Phantom alert 'Test AlertQuestionario' was removed by deleting test clients from MongoDB.
